description.en: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.
description.cn: 用于自动化、工作流和开发工具的多代理 AI 编排平台。Golutra 将 Codex、Claude Code 和 OpenClaw 转换为统一代理系统，支持并行执行、任务编排、长时间运行工作流以及 AI 生产力工作空间。
